title: Add Parent Insight Portal as 9th navigation tab with 3 menus and Monthly Parent Connect System

requirements.text: Add 'Parent Insight Portal' as a 9th menu item to the existing fixed horizontal top navigation bar in Navbar.tsx. It must follow the same styling conventions as the existing 8 tabs: single-line layout, even spacing, active tab underline and subtle color highlight, smooth CSS transition on tab switch, and no page reload. Register the new tab in App.tsx so clicking it renders the ParentInsightPortal component located at frontend/src/components/tabs/ParentInsightPortal.tsx.

quotes: Add a new top navigation menu called: Parent Insight Portal
When clicked, it should open a secure dashboard designed only for parents.

acceptanceCriteria: Navbar displays 9 tabs including 'Parent Insight Portal' in a single horizontal line
Clicking 'Parent Insight Portal' renders the ParentInsightPortal component without a page reload
Active tab shows underline and subtle color highlight consistent with existing tabs
Tab switch triggers smooth CSS transition animation

requirements.text: Create frontend/src/components/tabs/ParentInsightPortal.tsx as the root component for the Parent Insight Portal. It must contain 3 main menus navigable via a secondary horizontal tab bar: (1) Student Growth & Activity Report, (2) Faculty & Teaching Transparency, (3) Institute Development & Environment Report. Additionally, embed a persistent Monthly Parent Connect System panel at the bottom of the dashboard, always visible regardless of which menu is active. The overall visual theme must be soft blue and white — clean, emotional, trust-building, and premium — resembling a transparent smart education window for parents, with smooth animated transitions between sub-sections.

quotes: Inside this portal, create 3 main menus

acceptanceCriteria: Component renders at frontend/src/components/tabs/ParentInsightPortal.tsx
Secondary horizontal tab bar displays all 3 menu options
Switching between menus triggers smooth animated transitions
Persistent Monthly Parent Connect System panel is always visible at the bottom
Visual theme uses soft blue and white palette with clean, premium typography

requirements.text: Build the 'Student Growth & Activity Report' menu inside ParentInsightPortal. Include four sub-sections: (1) Academic Overview — showing Branch & Division, semester progress indicator, subject-wise performance cards with internal marks, attendance percentage, assignment completion rate, and skill development progress bars; (2) Activities & Achievements — showing hackathon participation, competitions attended, awards & certificates, club involvement, events participated, and leadership roles as a visual achievement gallery; (3) Career & Exam Preparation — showing the competitive exam the student is preparing for (GATE, UPSC, CAT, GRE, etc.), placement readiness score, internship status badge, certifications completed list, and a coding progress summary card (LeetCode stats + GitHub contribution summary mock); (4) Monthly Performance Summary — showing an improvement graph (SVG/CSS-based trend line), strength areas list, weak areas list, and an AI recommendation card for growth (mock data). Use an elegant report card dashboard layout with charts, progress meters, and a growth timeline.

quotes: Elegant report card dashboard with charts, progress meters, and growth timeline.

acceptanceCriteria: Academic Overview displays branch, division, semester progress, subject performance, attendance, assignment completion, and skill development
Activities & Achievements section displays hackathon participation, competitions, awards, club and event involvement, and leadership roles
Career & Exam Preparation section shows competitive exam target, placement readiness score, internship status, certifications, and coding progress
Monthly Performance Summary shows an improvement trend graph, strength areas, weak areas, and an AI growth recommendation card
Layout uses charts and progress meters consistent with a report card aesthetic

requirements.text: Build the 'Faculty & Teaching Transparency' menu inside ParentInsightPortal. Display: (1) a grid of teacher profile cards for each subject the child is enrolled in, each card showing teacher name, subject taught, qualification, years of experience, specialization, a LinkedIn profile preview link, and research or industry background note; (2) a class teacher name card and HOD name card prominently displayed; (3) per-teacher metrics including teacher engagement score, syllabus completion status progress bar, and a teaching feedback summary rating; (4) a class performance comparison indicator showing how the child's class compares to other divisions; (5) a prominent 'Is your child being guided by expert faculty?' trust indicator badge at the top of the section that evaluates the overall faculty quality score. Use professional profile card layout with performance indicator meters.

quotes: Which teacher is teaching each subject
Is your child being guided by expert faculty? indicator
Professional profile cards with performance indicators.

acceptanceCriteria: Teacher profile cards display name, subject, qualification, experience, specialization, LinkedIn link, and background note
Class teacher and HOD names are prominently displayed
Each teacher card shows engagement score, syllabus completion progress bar, and feedback summary
Class performance comparison is shown
'Is your child being guided by expert faculty?' trust indicator badge is displayed at the top and reflects an overall faculty quality assessment

requirements.text: Build the 'Institute Development & Environment Report' menu inside ParentInsightPortal. Include four sub-sections: (1) Infrastructure & Facilities — showing smartboard usage rate, lab upgrade updates, new technology introduced, software tools added, and industry collaboration updates as a timeline or card list; (2) Placement & Industry Exposure — showing new companies visiting, average package trends (year-on-year chart), internship tie-ups count, and industry workshops conducted; (3) Comparison with Top Colleges — showing how the institute's syllabus aligns with trending technologies, skill-based curriculum update notes, a modernization score meter, and innovation initiatives list; (4) Campus Environment — showing a student satisfaction index score, faculty quality index score, campus improvement updates, and an anti-trap safety reports status badge. Use an executive summary dashboard layout with trust indicators and data-driven visual elements.

quotes: Executive summary dashboard with trust indicators.

acceptanceCriteria: Infrastructure & Facilities section shows smartboard usage, lab upgrades, new tech, software tools, and industry collaboration
Placement & Industry Exposure section shows visiting companies, average package trend chart, internship tie-ups, and workshops
Comparison with Top Colleges section shows syllabus alignment, curriculum updates, modernization score meter, and innovation initiatives
Campus Environment section shows student satisfaction index, faculty quality index, campus improvement updates, and anti-trap safety status
Layout uses executive summary style with trust indicators

requirements.text: Build the persistent Monthly Parent Connect System panel inside ParentInsightPortal that is always visible at the bottom of the dashboard regardless of which menu tab is active. Include: (1) a 'Schedule Monthly Virtual Meeting' section with options to meet the class teacher or optionally the HOD, showing available time slots (mock data) and a confirm/schedule button; (2) a performance discussion notes area showing the agenda topics for the upcoming meeting; (3) a parent feedback submission form with a text area for written feedback and an improvement suggestion text field; (4) a parent satisfaction rating system with a 5-star rating input and a submit button. Style this panel as a visually distinct full-width bottom strip with a soft blue accent background that clearly separates it from the main content area.
acceptanceCriteria: Monthly Parent Connect panel is always visible at the bottom of the dashboard across all 3 menu tabs
Virtual meeting scheduling section shows options to meet class teacher or HOD with mock time slots and a confirm button
Performance discussion agenda topics are displayed
Parent feedback form includes a text area and improvement suggestion field with a submit button
Parent satisfaction rating system with 5-star input and submit button is present
Panel is visually distinct with a soft blue accent background separating it from main content

requirements.text: Add a 'Print / Download Monthly PDF Report' button to the ParentInsightPortal header area. Clicking this button should trigger the browser's native print dialog (window.print()) with print-specific CSS applied so that the currently visible dashboard content renders in a clean, report-style printable layout — hiding the navigation bars, interactive controls, and sidebar elements while preserving charts, progress meters, performance data, and summary cards.
acceptanceCriteria: A 'Print / Download Monthly Report' button is visible in the ParentInsightPortal header
Clicking the button triggers window.print()
Print CSS hides navigation bars, tab controls, and interactive buttons
Print layout preserves charts, progress bars, performance data, and summary cards in a clean report format

requirements.text: Define and apply CSS custom properties (design tokens) for the Parent Insight Portal in frontend/src/index.css. Use a soft sky blue and white primary palette (e.g., OKLCH-based tokens for parent-primary, parent-surface, parent-accent, parent-text) that is distinct from the teal/emerald student palette and the dark blue institute palette. Apply these tokens throughout all ParentInsightPortal sub-components to achieve a clean, emotional, trust-building premium aesthetic. Ensure the theme respects the existing light/dark mode toggle.

quotes: The portal should feel like: 'A transparent smart education window for parents.'

acceptanceCriteria: CSS custom properties for parent portal palette are defined in frontend/src/index.css
Tokens are distinct from existing student (teal/emerald) and institute (dark blue/silver) palettes
All ParentInsightPortal components use these tokens for backgrounds, cards, accents, and text
Light/dark mode toggle correctly applies parent portal theme variants

constraints: Do not modify any files listed under frontend.immutablePaths
All new components must use existing Tailwind config and CSS token conventions established in frontend/src/index.css
ParentInsightPortal must be a pure frontend component — no new backend logic is required
All data displayed in the portal must use mock/static data consistent with the existing prototype approach
nonGoals: Real authentication or role-based access control for the parent portal
Actual video conferencing integration for the monthly meeting system
Real PDF generation libraries — browser print dialog is sufficient
Backend data persistence for parent feedback or meeting schedules
Modifying any existing tab components (AcademicRoadmaps, CompetitiveExamHub, etc.)
